summary: A short-form ad hook should land as a visible contrast before the viewer has time to scroll.
principles: Make the first second show a before/after gap, contradiction, or sensory mismatch.
Let the visual gap raise the question; do not spend the hook explaining the whole product.
Resolve the contrast into the product promise by the reveal beat.
apply_when: The platform is TikTok, Reels, Shorts, or another fast-scroll placement.
The product has a demonstrable before/after, upgrade, relief, or contrast claim.
The audience needs to understand the promise silently before narration is processed.
avoid_when: The contrast would exaggerate the product claim beyond approved evidence.
The only available contrast is unrelated clickbait.
The brand requires a slow prestige opening with no abrupt visual interruption.
